post.message: Source file src/services/ai.service.js was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.
post.judgeRationale: judge dissented: The PR title claims to fix a message queue issue, and the diff introduces a `queuedProcessMessage` function with a `processingQueues` Map to serialize message processing per user, directly addressing the race condition implied by the title.

post.message: Source branch added in src/services/ai.service.js with no compensating test addition in this PR. Likely coverage erosion.
